project_area: Arts education and arts-based community building for older adults aged 60+
demographic_requirements: Projects must serve older adults aged 60+ and be led by experienced teaching artists in partnership with applicants.
eligibility_summary: Nonprofit organizations, municipalities, and educational institutions in Vermont may apply for grants up to $6,000 to support arts-based projects for older adults. Priority is given to projects facilitated by Vermont artists, especially those on the Creative Aging Teaching Artist Roster.
